public static long calculateAccumulatedPrice(long num, int x) {

    long total = 0;

    for (long m = x; ; m += x) {

        long twoPowerM = 1L << m; // 2^m

        // Check if 2^{m-1} > num? Because for m such that 2^{m-1} > num, the bit can't be set.

        // Wait, for m being 1-based, 2^{m-1} is the value of the bit. So if 2^{m-1} > num, then the bit can't be set in any number up to num.

        // So for m where 2^{m-1} > num, we can break.

        if ((1L << (m - 1)) > num) {

            break;

        }

        // compute count for this m

        long high = (num + 1) / (2 * (1L << (m - 1)));

        long count = high * (1L << (m - 1));

        long remainder = (num + 1) % (2 * (1L << (m - 1)));

        long half = 1L << (m - 1);

        if (remainder > half) {

            count += (remainder - half);

        }

        total += count;

    }

    return total;

}

public static long calculateAccumulatedPrice(long num, int x) {

    long total = 0;

    long bl = (num == 0) ? 0 : (64 - Long.numberOfLeadingZeros(num));

    for (long m = x; ; m += x) {

        }

        long twoPowerM = 1L << m; // 2^m

        long halfTwoPowerM = 1L << (m - 1); 

        // compute high = (num + 1) / twoPowerM

        long count = high * halfTwoPowerM;

        long remainder = (num + 1) % twoPowerM;

        if (remainder > halfTwoPowerM) {

            count += (remainder - halfTwoPowerM);

        }

        total += count;

    }

    return total;

}

public static long calculateAccumulatedPrice(long num, int x) {

    long total = 0;

    for (long m = x; ; m += x) {

        long twoPowerM = 1L << m; // 2^m

        // Check if 2^{m-1} > num? Because for m such that 2^{m-1} > num, the bit can't be set.

        // Wait, for m being 1-based, 2^{m-1} is the value of the bit. So if 2^{m-1} > num, then the bit can't be set in any number up to num.

        // So for m where 2^{m-1} > num, we can break.

        if ((1L << (m - 1)) > num) {

            break;

        }

        // compute count for this m

        long high = (num + 1) / (2 * (1L << (m - 1)));

        long count = high * (1L << (m - 1));

        long remainder = (num + 1) % (2 * (1L << (m - 1)));

        long half = 1L << (m - 1);

        if (remainder > half) {

            count += (remainder - half);

        }

        total += count;

    }

    return total;

}

public static long calculateAccumulatedPrice(long num, int x) {

    long total = 0;

    long bl = (num == 0) ? 0 : (64 - Long.numberOfLeadingZeros(num));

    for (long m = x; ; m += x) {

        if (m - 1 > bl) {

            break;

        }

        long twoPowerM = 1L << m; // 2^m

        long halfTwoPowerM = 1L << (m - 1); 

        // compute high = (num + 1) / twoPowerM 

        long high = (num + 1) / twoPowerM;

        long count = high * halfTwoPowerM;

        long remainder = (num + 1) % twoPowerM;

        if (remainder > halfTwoPowerM) {

            count += (remainder - halfTwoPowerM);

        }

        total += count;

    }

    return total;

}
